title: Prisoners
logline: When two young girls disappear on Thanksgiving Day, a desperate father takes matters into his own hands while a detective races to solve the case before more children vanish.
antagonistOrConflict: Holly Jones and the mystery of the missing children
themes: The lengths people go to protect their children

actBreaks.description: Keller and Franklin begin torturing Alex Jones in the abandoned apartment, crossing the moral line from desperate search to vigilante justice.

validation.ruling: Scene 72 shows Keller's irreversible decision to get out of his truck and confront Alex Jones after witnessing him abuse the dog, fundamentally changing the story direction from passive waiting to active vigilante pursuit.

actBreaks.description: Loki arrives at Holly Jones' house for the final confrontation, leading to the climactic revelation and resolution.

validation.ruling: Scene 196 shows Ralph and Eliza arriving at the apartment house with a duffle bag, representing the final setup before the climactic sequence and the point of no return for all characters converging on the resolution.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This is a tightly wound dual-protagonist thriller that maintains relentless forward momentum through parallel investigations. The structure cleverly uses the detective procedural framework to mask a deeper moral thriller about how far a parent will go. The script's genius lies in how it slowly reveals Keller's descent into darkness while Loki methodically closes in on the truth, creating a collision course that feels both inevitable and shocking. The pacing accelerates through increasingly shorter scenes as both storylines converge.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The script maintains tension through rapid scene cuts averaging just over one page each. Key pacing shifts occur around scene 100 when Eliza is taken (escalating stakes), scene 150 when Bob Taylor is introduced (false lead acceleration), and the final 30 scenes which become increasingly frantic as all storylines converge at Holly Jones' house.

incitingIncident.description: Keller, Ralph, and Franklin split up to search the neighborhood, discovering tire tracks where the RV was parked.

validation.ruling: Scene 18 shatters the ordinary world when Keller and Ralph discover the girls are missing and find RV tracks where it was parked, forcing Keller to call police and establishing the main conflict of finding the missing children.

midpoint.description: Father Dunn tells Loki and Detective Chemelinski that the dead man in his basement claimed to take children in daylight, sometimes more than one child at a time.
midpoint.sceneHeading: 94 INT. INTERROGATION ROOM - POLICE STATION - NIGHT 94

validation.ruling: Scene 100 is just ambient sound of a band saw, lacking dramatic weight. Scene 99 provides the crucial revelation when Father Dunn tells Loki the dead man confessed to taking children in daylight, shifting the investigation toward a larger conspiracy and raising stakes significantly.

climax.sceneHeading: 188 INT. FIRST FLOOR APARTMENT - APARTMENT HOUSE - MOMENTS 188

validation.ruling: Scene 188 shows Ralph and Eliza in an apartment hearing sounds upstairs, which is setup not climax. Scene 198 is the ultimate confrontation where Loki faces Holly Jones in her kitchen, leading to the shootout that resolves the main story question and demonstrates his character arc completion.

scenes.heading: 1 EXT. FIELD - DAWN/THANKSGIVING 1
scenes.summary: Keller Dover watches his 15-year-old son Ralph shoot a deer during a hunting trip on Thanksgiving morning.

scenes.heading: 2 EXT. HIGHWAY - LATER 2
scenes.summary: Keller drives his pickup truck down the highway with the dead deer in the flatbed.

scenes.heading: 3 INT. KELLER’S TRUCK - TRAVELING 3
scenes.summary: Keller lectures Ralph about being prepared for disasters while driving, emphasizing self-reliance and survival.

scenes.heading: 4 EXT. FAIRMOUNT CIRCLE - DAY/THANKSGIVING DAY 4
scenes.summary: An old yellowed RV drives through the neighborhood as the Dover family prepares to visit the Birches for Thanksgiving dinner.

scenes.heading: 5 INT. KITCHEN - THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - LATER 5
scenes.summary: The families prepare Thanksgiving dinner together while Anna asks permission to go outside with Joy.

scenes.heading: 6 EXT. FAIRMOUNT CIRCLE - DAY 6
scenes.summary: The children play outside while Ralph warns the girls to stay away from the parked RV after Joy races toward it.

scenes.heading: 7 INT. DINING ROOM - THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - LATER 7
scenes.summary: The families sit around the post-dinner table with dirty dishes and wine glasses.

scenes.heading: 8 INT. LIVING ROOM - THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 8
scenes.summary: Anna asks permission to take Joy to look for her lost emergency whistle while Franklin drunkenly plays trumpet.

scenes.heading: 9 INT. KITCHEN - THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 9
scenes.summary: Grace and Keller share an intimate moment in the kitchen while Franklin's music plays loudly.

scenes.heading: 10 EXT. THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - DUSK 10
scenes.summary: The sun sets behind the Birch house.

scenes.heading: 11 INT. BASEMENT/TV ROOM - THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - DUSK 11
scenes.summary: Keller and Grace discover that Anna and Joy are missing when they find Ralph and Eliza watching TV instead of supervising the girls.
scenes.turningPointNote: The inciting incident - the children's disappearance is discovered

scenes.heading: 12 EXT. FAIRMOUNT CIRCLE - DUSK 12
scenes.summary: Keller runs down the street without his coat searching for the girls.

scenes.heading: 13 INT. KITCHEN - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 13
scenes.summary: Keller searches through his kitchen calling for the girls.

scenes.heading: 14 INT. STAIRS - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 14
scenes.summary: Keller runs upstairs calling for Anna and the girls.

scenes.heading: 15 INT. HALLWAY - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 15
scenes.summary: Keller searches through all the bedrooms but finds them empty.

scenes.heading: 16 INT. BASEMENT - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 16
scenes.summary: Keller searches his survival bunker basement filled with supplies and weapons but finds no girls.

scenes.heading: 17 INT. LIVING ROOM - THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 17
scenes.summary: Keller returns to the Birch house empty-handed while Ralph mentions the RV the girls were playing on.

scenes.heading: 18 EXT. FAIRMOUNT CIRCLE - CONTINUOUS 18
scenes.summary: Keller, Ralph, and Franklin split up to search the neighborhood, discovering tire tracks where the RV was parked.

scenes.heading: 19 INT. SAIKEI GARDEN - LATER 19
scenes.summary: Detective Loki finishes dinner alone at a Chinese restaurant when his phone rings.

scenes.heading: INT. LOKI’S SEDAN - PARKED/SAIKEI GARDEN - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Loki hears a radio dispatch about the RV and volunteers to respond to the call.

scenes.heading: 20 OMITTED 20
scenes.summary: Scene is omitted.

scenes.heading: 21 EXT. GAS STATION - NIGHT 21
scenes.summary: Loki and two officers approach the RV at a gas station when it suddenly starts up and crashes while trying to escape.

scenes.heading: 22 INT. RV - CONTINUOUS 22
scenes.summary: Loki enters the crashed RV and arrests Alex Jones, demanding to know where the girls are while searching the vehicle.

scenes.heading: 23 EXT. RV - CONTINUOUS 23
scenes.summary: Loki forces Alex Jones to walk toward the woods where officers search with flashlights but find nothing.

scenes.heading: 24 EXT. FAIRMOUNT CIRCLE - NIGHT 24
scenes.summary: Keller and Ralph search neighbors' yards with flashlights while a groggy neighbor asks what's happening.

scenes.heading: 25 INT. INTERROGATION ROOM - POLICE STATION - NIGHT 25
scenes.summary: Alex Jones denies seeing the girls when Loki shows him their photos during interrogation.

scenes.heading: 26 THE RV AS FORENSICS TEARS IT APART 26
scenes.summary: Forensics team tears apart the RV searching for evidence while Jones explains he parks at his aunt's house.

scenes.heading: 27 EXT. BACKYARD - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - NIGHT 27
scenes.summary: Loki meets Holly Jones in her backyard where she mentions her husband's Trans Am is for sale.

scenes.heading: 28 INT. HOLLY JONES' HOUSE – NIGHT 28
scenes.summary: Holly Jones shows Loki through her cluttered house and explains Alex sleeps on the couch in winter.

scenes.heading: 29 INT. LAUNDRY ROOM - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - NIGHT 29
scenes.summary: Holly Jones explains to Loki that her husband left five years ago and Alex's parents died in a car accident.

scenes.heading: 30 EXT. FAIRMOUNT CIRCLE - NIGHT 30
scenes.summary: Franklin tells Keller and Ralph that the RV was found empty and they're organizing a search party.

scenes.heading: 31 INT. GARAGE - POLICE STATION - NIGHT 31
scenes.summary: Forensics Guy tells Loki the RV is clean of evidence despite being thoroughly searched.

scenes.heading: 32 EXT. GAS STATION - NIGHT 32
scenes.summary: The gas station lot swarms with cops and volunteers heading into the woods.

scenes.heading: 33 EXT. WOODS - NIGHT 33
scenes.summary: Flashlights move through the dark woods as Keller, Ralph, and Franklin search for the girls.

scenes.heading: 34 EXT. FAIRMOUNT CIRCLE - MORNING 34
scenes.summary: Loki's car drives toward the Dover house from an aerial view.

scenes.heading: 35 OMITTED 35
scenes.summary: Scene is omitted.

scenes.heading: EXT. THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Neighbors gather outside the Birch house wanting to help as Loki arrives.

scenes.heading: INT. KITCHEN - THE BIRCHES’ HOUSE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Nancy Birch gives Loki a better photo of Joy while holding herself together with visible strain.

scenes.heading: 36 INT. RALPH’S ROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 36
scenes.summary: Ralph sleeps fully clothed on his bed after the long night of searching.

scenes.heading: 37 INT. BATHROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 37
scenes.summary: Keller splashes water on his face and notices Anna's toothbrush in the holder.

scenes.heading: 38 INT. LIVING ROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 38
scenes.summary: Grace tells Loki they passed their polygraph tests and expresses hope the girls are just hiding somewhere.

scenes.heading: 39 EXT. DRIVEWAY - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 39
scenes.summary: Keller demands that Loki keep Alex Jones in custody, insisting two little girls are worth breaking rules.

scenes.heading: 40 INT. CAPTAIN’S OFFICE - POLICE STATION - DAY 40
scenes.summary: Captain O'Malley refuses Loki's request to extend Jones' custody and reveals Loki has been seeking a transfer.

scenes.heading: 41 INT. LIVING ROOM - SEX OFFENDER’S HOUSE 1 - NIGHT 41
scenes.summary: Loki questions a muscled sex offender about what was hanging on his wall full of nail holes.

scenes.heading: 42 INT. GARAGE - SEX OFFENDER’S HOUSE 1 - NIGHT 42
scenes.summary: Loki finds framed family photos in a box while the sex offender watches.

scenes.heading: 43 EXT. FAST FOOD RESTAURANT - NIGHT 43
scenes.summary: Loki questions a fast food employee through the restaurant window.

scenes.heading: 44 EXT. LOKI’S SEDAN - NIGHT 44
scenes.summary: Loki walks to his car in the downtown area surrounded by strip malls and passing traffic.

scenes.heading: 45 EXT. BACK YARD - SEX OFFENDER’S HOUSE 2 - NIGHT 45
scenes.summary: Loki searches a grey-haired sex offender's tool shed and confiscates pornographic magazines the man isn't allowed to have.

scenes.heading: 46 EXT. YARD - NICE HOUSE 2 - NIGHT 46
scenes.summary: Loki angrily orders the grey-haired man to get back inside his house after the man follows him out.

scenes.heading: 47 EXT. SAINT EMILIANA CHURCH - NIGHT 47
scenes.summary: Loki's headlights illuminate a boarded-up church and the adjacent rectory before going dark.

scenes.heading: 48 INT. BLACK SEDAN - PARKED - CONTINUOUS 48
scenes.summary: Loki sits in his car eating coffee beans and crosses off the last name on his list of sex offenders.

scenes.heading: 49 EXT. FRONT DOOR - RECTORY - MOMENTS LATER 49
scenes.summary: Loki rings a broken doorbell at a rectory, pounds on the door, and sees through a window an old priest lying motionless on the floor.

scenes.heading: 50 INT. LIVING ROOM - THE RECTORY - CONTINUOUS 50
scenes.summary: Loki enters the rectory and finds Father Patrick Dunn passed out drunk among empty liquor bottles, not dead but snoring.

scenes.heading: 51 INT. KITCHEN - RECTORY - CONTINUOUS 51
scenes.summary: Loki discovers the refrigerator has been moved to block a door and pushes it aside to reveal the entrance.

scenes.heading: 52 INT. THE BASEMENT - THE RECTORY - MOMENTS LATER 52
scenes.summary: Loki opens the basement door to find the stairs removed, drops down ten feet, and discovers a corpse behind three saint statues.
scenes.turningPointNote: Discovery of a body in the priest's basement opens a new investigative thread

scenes.heading: 53 INT. KITCHEN - RECTORY - MOMENTS LATER 53
scenes.summary: Loki threatens to throw the terrified Father Dunn into the basement with the corpse unless he reveals the dead man's identity.

scenes.heading: 54 EXT. WOODS - MORNING 54
scenes.summary: Keller receives a call from Grace that police are releasing Alex Jones and runs toward Franklin and Ralph in the woods.

scenes.heading: 55 INT. LOKI’S DESK - POLICE STATION - DAY 55
scenes.summary: At the police station, Loki watches Alex Jones sign his release papers as Alex Winterman Jones while Father Dunn is interrogated in the background.

scenes.heading: 56 EXT. POLICE STATION - MOMENTS LATER 56
scenes.summary: A uniformed cop escorts Jones and his aunt Holly past waiting reporters outside the police station.

scenes.heading: INT. LOKI’S DESK - POLICE STATION - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Loki sees Keller's truck arriving in the parking lot and calls for backup from other officers.

scenes.heading: EXT. POLICE STATION - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Keller pushes past reporters to confront Jones but is restrained by multiple officers while Loki and additional cops arrive to control the situation.

scenes.heading: 57 INT. CAPTAIN’S OFFICE - POLICE STATION - CONTINUOUS 57
scenes.summary: Captain O'Malley uncuffs Keller and tells him Jones cannot leave the commonwealth, while Keller demands they arrest someone based on information he provided.

scenes.heading: 58 INT. LIVING ROOM - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - DAY 58
scenes.summary: Loki questions Jones about whether he said anything to Keller in the parking lot, and Jones denies saying anything at all.

scenes.heading: 59 EXT. HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 59
scenes.summary: Loki walks to his car while talking on the phone.

scenes.heading: 60 INT. SECOND FLOOR HALLWAY - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - 60
scenes.summary: Keller asks Loki over the phone if he has arrested Jones, and Loki explains Jones didn't budge under questioning before hanging up.

scenes.heading: 61 INT. MASTER BEDROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 61
scenes.summary: Keller finds Grace hysterical in bed, clinging to Ralph and demanding to know why Anna hasn't come home after three days.

scenes.heading: 62 INT. HALLWAY - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 62
scenes.summary: Keller tells Ralph to watch his mother and be brave for his sister, then rushes past him despite Ralph's tearful plea not to leave.

scenes.heading: 63 EXT. DRIVEWAY - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - DUSK 63
scenes.summary: Keller walks out of his house and gets in his truck.

scenes.heading: 64 INT. KELLER’S TRUCK - PARKED - CONTINUOUS 64
scenes.summary: Keller starts his truck, turns off a religious tape about trouble and affliction, and drives away from his house.

scenes.heading: 65 EXT. GUN HILL ROAD - NIGHT 65
scenes.summary: Keller's truck pulls up across the street from Holly Jones' house on a narrow lane.

scenes.heading: 66 INT. KELLER’S TRUCK - PARKED - CONTINUOUS 66
scenes.summary: Keller turns off his engine and watches the little house from his parked truck.

scenes.heading: 67 INT. KELLER’S TRUCK - PARKED - LATER 67
scenes.summary: Jones emerges with the dog, lifts it by its leash to taunt it while it dangles, then whistles 'Jingle Bells' while looking at the sky.

scenes.heading: 68 EXT. HOLLY JONES' STREET - CONTINUOUS 68
scenes.summary: Keller approaches Jones from behind in the darkness and aims a pistol at his head, asking about the song he was whistling.
scenes.turningPointNote: Keller takes direct action by confronting Jones at gunpoint, escalating beyond legal boundaries

scenes.heading: 69 INT. JOY’S ROOM - THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - DAWN 69
scenes.summary: Joy's gerbil runs through a habitrail as Keller's truck arrives and Franklin gets in carrying a backpack.

scenes.heading: 70 INT. KELLER’S TRUCK - CONTINUOUS 70
scenes.summary: Keller drives with Franklin, who notices Keller's red eyes and gauze-wrapped knuckles, as they head to a condemned apartment building.

scenes.heading: 71 EXT. APARTMENT HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 71
scenes.summary: Keller uses a key to unlock the padlocked door of a condemned apartment house where he used to live.

scenes.heading: 72 INT. SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - APARTMENT HOUSE -CONTINUOUS 72
scenes.summary: Keller shows Franklin into the gutted apartment and opens the bathroom door to reveal Jones tied to a pipe in the shower stall with duct tape over his mouth.
scenes.turningPointNote: The revelation that Keller has kidnapped and is torturing Jones fundamentally changes the moral landscape of the story

scenes.heading: 73 EXT. NEIGHBOR’S HOUSE - FAIRMOUNT CIRCLE - DAY 73
scenes.summary: Loki investigates a house on Fairmount Circle while talking to his captain about the unidentified corpse from the priest's basement.

scenes.heading: 74 EXT. THE MILLANDS’ HOUSE - DAY 74
scenes.summary: Kim Milland opens her door for Detective Loki and mentions that her mother was wondering when someone would come see them about Barry.

scenes.heading: 75 INT. LIVING ROOM - THE MILLANDS’ HOUSE - DAY 75
scenes.summary: Mrs. Milland shows Loki a deteriorating home video of her son Barry who disappeared 26 years ago, believing the same person took him and the current missing girls.

scenes.heading: 76 OMITTED 76
scenes.summary: This scene is omitted.

scenes.heading: 77 INT. BEDROOM - THE MILLANDS’ HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 77
scenes.summary: Elliott Milland shows Loki Barry's preserved belongings and mentions an incident where his confused mother grabbed Keller's son Ralph years ago, mistaking him for Barry.

scenes.heading: 78 EXT. APARTMENT HOUSE - NIGHT 78
scenes.summary: The apartment house sits in darkness with a lone light in the second floor window.

scenes.heading: 79 INT. BATHROOM - SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - NIGHT 79
scenes.summary: Franklin holds Jones upright while Keller repeatedly punches his bloodied face, then Keller returns with a hammer and holds it up threateningly.

scenes.heading: 80 INT. SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - APARTMENT HOUSE - LATER 80
scenes.summary: Keller unwraps bloodied rags from his knuckles while Franklin changes shirts, and they discuss continuing the torture in the morning despite Franklin's doubts.

scenes.heading: 81 EXT. FAIRMOUNT CIRCLE - NIGHT 81
scenes.summary: Franklin walks through a candlelight vigil of a hundred people, meets Nancy and Eliza, but becomes nauseous from the lights and leaves abruptly.

scenes.heading: 82 INT. TV ROOM - THE BIRCH’S HOUSE - MORNING 82
scenes.summary: Franklin watches a news report showing a police sketch of the Tall Man when Keller's truck arrives outside.

scenes.heading: 83 EXT. APARTMENT HOUSE - MORNING 83
scenes.summary: Franklin argues with Keller about the police sketch, while Keller insists Jones and the Tall Man worked together and that Jones confessed the children only cried when he left them.

scenes.heading: 84 INT. CAPTAIN’S OFFICE - POLICE STATION - DAY 84
scenes.summary: Loki brings Holly Jones' dog collar to Captain O'Malley, explaining the dog was hit by a car after Jones took it for a walk and never returned.

scenes.heading: 85 INT. MEDIA ROOM - POLICE STATION - DAY 85
scenes.summary: Loki reviews surveillance video of his interrogation of Jones, watching Jones look at photos of Anna and Joy with no telling expression.

scenes.heading: 86 INT. DISCOUNT DEPARTMENT STORE - DAY 86
scenes.summary: A store clerk named Jill tells Loki about a man matching the sketch who regularly buys children's clothes in different sizes and was caught messing with mannequins.

scenes.heading: 87 INT. SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - NIGHT 87
scenes.summary: Franklin cries silently while changing clothes and wiping blood from his face as Keller insists they continue torturing Jones because it might be the last night that matters.

scenes.heading: 88 INT. KITCHEN - THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - NIGHT 88
scenes.summary: Nancy pours cereal for Eliza and asks her to feed Joy's gerbil until Joy comes back.

scenes.heading: 89 INT. VESTIBULE - THE BIRCH’S HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 89
scenes.summary: Franklin snaps at Nancy when she questions what time he came home, shocking her with his aged appearance and distant stare.

scenes.heading: 90 EXT. THE DOVERS' HOUSE - NIGHT 90
scenes.summary: Nancy confronts Keller at his door about what he was thinking, and after confirming she hasn't told anyone, she demands to see Jones.

scenes.heading: 91 INT. KELLER’S TRUCK - TRAVELING - NIGHT 91
scenes.summary: Keller drives Nancy and Franklin to a liquor store parking lot, explaining they can't park in front of the apartment anymore because people will notice.

scenes.heading: 92 EXT. LIQUOR STORE PARKING LOT - NIGHT 92
scenes.summary: Keller, Nancy and Franklin walk silently across the parking lot with a doll visible in Nancy's purse.

scenes.heading: 93 INT. BATHROOM - SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - CONTINUOUS 93
scenes.summary: Nancy enters the bathroom alone and shows the bound and bloodied Jones photos and drawings of Joy, along with her favorite doll, pleading for information about her daughter's location.

scenes.heading: 94 INT. INTERROGATION ROOM - POLICE STATION - NIGHT 94
scenes.summary: Father Dunn tells Loki and Detective Chemelinski that the dead man in his basement claimed to take children in daylight, sometimes more than one child at a time.

scenes.heading: 95 INT. SECOND FLOOR HALLWAY - APARTMENT HOUSE - NIGHT 95
scenes.summary: The sound of a band saw revving up can be heard from behind the closed apartment door.
scenes.turningPointNote: The sound of a band saw suggests the torture is escalating to potentially lethal levels, marking a point of no return

scenes.heading: 96 INT. SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - APARTMENT - NIGHT 96
scenes.summary: Keller works obsessively with a band saw and nail gun in the apartment, building something obscured by sawdust and close framing.

scenes.heading: 97 INT. THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - KITCHEN - NIGHT 97
scenes.summary: Nancy stands in her kitchen at 2:05 AM when Keller arrives covered in sawdust, telling her to get Franklin because he needs to show them how something works.

scenes.heading: 98 INT. SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - APARTMENT HOUSE - NIGHT 98
scenes.summary: Keller, Franklin and Nancy approach the closed bathroom door as Franklin insists they need to let Jones go and Keller maintains Jones will talk soon.

scenes.heading: 99 INT. BATHROOM - SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - CONTINUOUS 99
scenes.summary: Keller reveals the wooden cell he's built where the shower used to be, complete with controlled scalding/freezing water, while Jones sobs inside and Nancy and Franklin react with horror.
scenes.turningPointNote: The full extent of Keller's torture apparatus is revealed, showing how far he's descended into vigilante brutality

scenes.heading: 100 EXT. FRONT/BACK YARD - THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - NIGHT 100
scenes.summary: An unseen intruder creeps across the Birches' moonlit backyard and jimmies the back door lock with a screwdriver.

scenes.heading: 101 INT. BATHROOM - THE BIRCH’S HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 101
scenes.summary: Eliza takes a bath while talking to Ralph on her cell phone about wanting to leave the house and refusing to stay at his father's building.

scenes.heading: 102 INT. HALLWAY - THE BIRCH’S HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 102
scenes.summary: The intruder moves down the hallway and stops at the closed bathroom door, listening to Eliza's voice inside.

scenes.heading: 103 INT. MINIVAN - THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 103
scenes.summary: Franklin and Nancy sit in their minivan as Franklin declares his intention to free Jones, but Nancy threatens to call police if he does, insisting they neither help nor stop Keller.

scenes.heading: 104 INT. HALLWAY - THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 104
scenes.summary: Nancy discovers Eliza won't answer the locked bathroom door and screams at Franklin to break it down while rattling the doorknob frantically.

scenes.heading: 105 EXT. FAIRMOUNT CIRCLE - CONTINUOUS 105
scenes.summary: The intruder moves across the street to the Dovers' house, noting Keller's truck isn't in the driveway, and heads to the back.

scenes.heading: 106 INT. HALLWAY - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 106
scenes.summary: The intruder moves past Ralph's closed room where muffled phone conversation can be heard.

scenes.heading: 107 INT. MASTER BEDROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 107
scenes.summary: Grace wakes up in bed after hearing a noise and calls out for Anna before getting up to investigate.

scenes.heading: 108 INT. HALLWAY - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 108
scenes.summary: Grace moves slowly down the hallway and sees Anna's bedroom door is open.

scenes.heading: 109 INT. ANNA’S ROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 109
scenes.summary: Grace enters Anna's room to find the window conspicuously open with billowing curtains, calls for Anna, then Ralph appears and closes the window after looking outside.

scenes.heading: 110 INT. ANNA’S ROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - LATER 110
scenes.summary: Loki follows a heavily drugged Grace into Anna's room as she insists Anna was there and opened the window, then asks to check the basement.

scenes.heading: 111 INT. BASEMENT - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 111
scenes.summary: Grace leads Loki to the basement where he notices Keller's provisions, a stick figure drawing in a box, and a half-used bag of lye while asking about Keller's whereabouts.

scenes.heading: 112 INT. BLACK SEDAN - PARKED - DAY 112
scenes.summary: Loki sits in his car during frozen rain, using windshield wipers to see while parked up the street from the Dovers' house.

scenes.heading: 113 EXT. THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 113
scenes.summary: Keller emerges from his front door and walks to his truck.

scenes.heading: 114 INT. BLACK SEDAN - TRAVELING - CONTINUOUS 114
scenes.summary: Loki drives while tailing Keller, popping coffee beans and tuning the radio to stay alert.

scenes.heading: 115 INT. KELLER’S TRUCK - TRAVELING - CONTINUOUS 115
scenes.summary: Keller listens to the Everyday Testament while driving, fast forwarding through it until the tape gets eaten.

scenes.heading: 116 EXT. LIQUOR STORE PARKING LOT - CONTINUOUS 116
scenes.summary: Keller pulls into the liquor store parking lot.

scenes.heading: 117 EXT. LIQUOR STORE PARKING LOT - CONTINUOUS 117
scenes.summary: Keller gets out of his truck and walks across the parking lot toward the apartment house.

scenes.heading: 118 INT. BLACK SEDAN - PARKED - CONTINUOUS 118
scenes.summary: Loki pulls to the side of the road to watch Keller when a truck behind him blares its horn and won't move.

scenes.heading: 119 EXT. LIQUOR STORE PARKING LOT - CONTINUOUS 119
scenes.summary: Keller hears the horn blaring, spots Loki's car, realizes he's busted, and quickly changes direction toward the liquor store instead of the apartment house.

scenes.heading: 120 INT. BLACK SEDAN - PARKED - CONTINUOUS 120
scenes.summary: Loki watches, baffled, as Keller walks into the liquor store.

scenes.heading: 121 OMITTED 121
scenes.summary: Scene is omitted.

scenes.heading: EXT. PARKING LOT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Freezing rain turns to snow as Loki waits in his car, watching the liquor store through his side mirror.

scenes.heading: 122 INT. BLACK SEDAN - PARKED - MOMENTS LATER 122
scenes.summary: Loki watches as Keller exits the liquor store with a paper bag, pulls out a bottle, and walks directly toward Loki's car while drinking.

scenes.heading: 123 EXT. LIQUOR STORE PARKING LOT - CONTINUOUS 123
scenes.summary: Keller knocks on Loki's passenger window and asks why he's being followed.

scenes.heading: 124 INT. BLACK SEDAN - PARKED - CONTINUOUS 124
scenes.summary: Loki confronts Keller about the half-gone lye bag and his lies about helping police, while Keller claims he used lye to bury their dog and has been driving aimlessly.

scenes.heading: 125 EXT. THE DOVERS' HOUSE - DUSK 125
scenes.summary: Completely drunk and half-frozen, Keller trudges up his driveway and tosses the empty whiskey bottle into a snow drift.

scenes.heading: 126 INT. BEDROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 126
scenes.summary: Keller crawls into bed fully clothed next to the passed-out Grace, nearly falling over while removing his boots.

scenes.heading: 127 INT. KELLER’S DREAM - BEDROOM - NIGHT - THE DOVERS' HOUSE 127
scenes.summary: In Keller's dream, Anna appears by his bedside holding a red whistle and tells him they found it at the bottom of the Brewers' pool.

scenes.heading: 128 INT. BEDROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - MORNING 128
scenes.summary: Keller wakes up aghast and still drunk, stares at where Anna stood in his dream, then his face goes hard with fright as he jumps out of bed.

scenes.heading: 129 INT. DEN - PAUL BREWER’S HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 129
scenes.summary: Bill Brewer alerts his mother Jane about a man in their yard, causing her to drop her coffee and call for Paul when she sees through the glass door.

scenes.heading: 130 EXT. POOL AREA - PAUL BREWER’S HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 130
scenes.summary: Paul approaches his pool where the cover has been partially dragged off, and Keller suddenly bursts to the surface gasping for air, climbing out blue and shivering.

scenes.heading: 131 EXT. RIVERBANK - MORNING 131
scenes.summary: Police boats deploy divers over the river while search and rescue dogs roam the shoreline and search teams move into adjacent woods.

scenes.heading: 132 INT. LOKI’S DESK - CONYERS POLICE STATION - DAY 132
scenes.summary: Loki, having worked all night, stares at his computer screen showing a newspaper article about Keller's father's suicide with an address that makes him remember something.

scenes.heading: 133 EXT. LIQUOR STORE PARKING LOT - DAY 133
scenes.summary: Keller walks across the parking lot past his truck and continues toward the apartment house.

scenes.heading: 134 INT. BATHROOM - SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - DAY 134
scenes.summary: Keller operates the scalding shower torture on Jones when he hears Jones mumbling 'I'm not Alex' repeatedly, giving Keller a burst of adrenaline as he demands answers.
scenes.turningPointNote: Jones reveals he's not Alex, potentially indicating a case of mistaken identity that could unravel Keller's entire justification for torture

scenes.heading: 135 EXT. APARTMENT HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 135
scenes.summary: Loki's car pulls up in front of the apartment house and he gets out to observe the building from the street.

scenes.heading: 136 INT. BATHROOM - SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - DAY 136
scenes.summary: Keller stands up and takes a breath while looking over at the cell.

scenes.heading: 137 EXT. APARTMENT HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 137
scenes.summary: Loki notices the padlock on the front door is unclamped, realizes someone's inside, and clamps it shut to trap them.

scenes.heading: 138 INT. BATHROOM - SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - MOMENTS LATER 138
scenes.summary: Keller is about to turn the hot water back on when he looks out the bathroom window and sees Loki trying to remove a board from a low window.

scenes.heading: 139 INT. STAIRS - CONTINUOUS 139
scenes.summary: Keller makes a mad dash down the stairs to the front door but discovers Loki has padlocked it from the outside, trapping him.

scenes.heading: 140 INT. FIRST FLOOR APARTMENT - CONTINUOUS 140
scenes.summary: Keller frantically lies down on his coat pretending to sleep as Loki pries off a window board, climbs inside, and wakes him by toeing his ribs.

scenes.heading: 141 INT. STAIRWELL - APARTMENT HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 141
scenes.summary: Keller walks up the stairs with panic in his eyes while Loki follows, questioning why he didn't mention this place.

scenes.heading: 142 INT. SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - APARTMENT HOUSE - 142
scenes.summary: Loki follows Keller into the second floor apartment, claps his hands to wake himself up, and questions Keller about his survival preparations.

scenes.heading: 143 INT. STAIRWELL - APARTMENT HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 143
scenes.summary: Loki follows Keller up the stairs to the second floor when his phone rings, interrupting the tense ascent.

scenes.heading: 144 EXT. PARKING LOT - DISCOUNT DEPARTMENT STORE - CONTINUOUS 144
scenes.summary: Jill the checkout girl calls Loki from a discount store parking lot, reporting that the guy he's looking for was just there but ran when he saw her watching.

scenes.heading: 145 INT. STAIRWELL - APARTMENT HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 145
scenes.summary: Loki rushes past Keller up the stairs to the second floor while Keller freezes and listens to Loki's echoing footfalls until they stop at the door.

scenes.heading: 146 INT. SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - CONTINUOUS 146
scenes.summary: Loki walks inside the apartment and takes a quick look around, but the bathroom light is out and Jones remains silent, making the cell look like an unfinished wall before Loki rushes out.

scenes.heading: 147 INT. HALLWAY - THE APARTMENT HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 147
scenes.summary: Loki walks out into the hall and rushes past Keller down the stairs, telling him to go home, while Keller stands dumbstruck realizing his good luck.

scenes.heading: 148 EXT. FRONT DOOR - BOB TAYLOR’S HOUSE - DAY 148
scenes.summary: Loki pushes Bob Taylor's doorbell and confronts him about running away and shopping at AJ Sax, while Bob denies recognizing him and makes a comment about Loki's expensive suit.

scenes.heading: 149 INT. VESTIBULE - BOB TAYLOR’S HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 149
scenes.summary: Loki shoves the door open, grabs Bob, slams him into shelves and breaks his nose before cuffing him and calling for a rescue unit while discovering mazes drawn on walls.

scenes.heading: EXT. LOKI’S SEDAN - PARKED/BOB’S HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Loki throws cuffed Bob Taylor into his car, slams the door, and grabs a crowbar from his trunk.

scenes.heading: INT. HALLWAY - BOB TAYLOR’S HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Loki pries open a locked door with the crowbar, revealing sixteen heavy plastic containers, then breaks one open to find bloody kids clothes with a snake rising up and hissing.
scenes.turningPointNote: Discovery of what appears to be evidence of the children's deaths - a major breakthrough in the investigation

scenes.heading: 150 INT. HALLWAY - POLICE STATION - DAY 150
scenes.summary: Keller sits on a bench as Franklin bursts out horrified and Nancy comes out in tears, both rushing past him while Loki stands in the doorway looking shaken.

scenes.heading: 151 INT. EVIDENCE ROOM - POLICE STATION - CONTINUOUS 151
scenes.summary: Loki shows Keller a table covered with evidence bags containing bloody children's clothing, explaining the Birches positively identified two items as their daughter's and asking if Keller recognizes anything.
scenes.turningPointNote: Parents confronted with apparent evidence of their children's deaths - devastating revelation that seems to confirm the worst

scenes.heading: 152 INT. MASTER BEDROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 152
scenes.summary: Keller opens the door and looks in on Grace passed out in bed, watching her with a face like a malfunctioning robot.

scenes.heading: 153 INT. ANNA’S ROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - DAY 153
scenes.summary: Ralph sits in shock holding his cell phone when Keller enters, and after Ralph asks if the children are dead, Keller grabs and shakes him, demanding he not tell his mother about the bloody clothes.

scenes.heading: 154 INT. OBSERVATION ROOM - POLICE STATION - NIGHT 154
scenes.summary: Loki and O'Malley watch through a two-way mirror as shackled Bob Taylor draws an insanely dense maze for three and a half hours.

scenes.heading: 155 INT. HALLWAY - POLICE STATION - LATER 155
scenes.summary: Loki approaches guards outside a closed door, unholsters his gun and hands it to Carter, then lies about having permission from the captain to enter.

scenes.heading: 156 INT. INTERROGATION ROOM - POLICE STATION - LATER 156
scenes.summary: Loki enters and grabs the crayon from Bob, demanding he explain the maze, then smashes Bob's broken nose into the table and throws him to the floor when he refuses to talk.

scenes.heading: 157 INT. DANDELION ANIMAL HOSPITAL - NIGHT 157
scenes.summary: Nancy enters the animal hospital in darkness, punches in the alarm code, hits the lights and rushes to a supply closet, fumbling with trembling hands to unlock it.

scenes.heading: 158 INT. SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - APARTMENT HOUSE - NIGHT 158
scenes.summary: Nancy Birch arrives at the apartment with a white paper bag, peers into the bathroom cell, and tells Keller she was praying he had ended this already before holding up the bag containing poison.

scenes.heading: 159 INT. BATHROOM - SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - LATER 159
scenes.summary: Keller sits guzzling whiskey and examines the white bag containing poison when Jones whispers through the PVC pipe that 'they're in the maze.'
scenes.turningPointNote: Jones finally speaks and provides a crucial clue about the children's location

scenes.heading: 160 INT. HALLWAY - POLICE STATION - NIGHT 160
scenes.summary: Loki sleeps on a bench until O'Malley kicks his foot to wake him as Taylor's corpse is rolled out of the interrogation room, with O'Malley shoving the blood-spattered maze drawing into Loki's hand.
scenes.turningPointNote: Bob Taylor's death eliminates a key suspect and potential source of information

scenes.heading: 161 EXT. HOLLY JONES’ HOUSE - DAY 161
scenes.summary: Keller rings Holly Jones' doorbell and introduces himself as the father of the abducted girl, causing Holly to step back in fear and start closing the door.

scenes.heading: 162 INT. KITCHEN - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 162
scenes.summary: Holly Jones sits across from Keller in her kitchen, drinking tea and telling him about her devout past, her son's death from cancer, and how adopting Alex helped but never got them over their loss.

scenes.heading: 163 INT. O’MALLEY’S OFFICE - POLICE STATION - DAY 163
scenes.summary: Loki sits staring at Bob's maze drawing while O'Malley pours whiskey and tells him they're deploying cadaver dogs, saying they're not superheroes who save everyone.

scenes.heading: 164 INT. LOKI’S DESK - CONYERS POLICE STATION - DAY 164
scenes.summary: Loki straight-arms everything off his desk including the computer monitor, then sits with Jones' matchbox RV and pushes it off the edge, discovering crime scene photos that catch his eye.

scenes.heading: 165 EXT. BOB TAYLOR’S BACKYARD - DAY 165
scenes.summary: Loki approaches a forensics team staring at what appears to be two buried bodies, but discovers they are department store mannequins with caved-in heads, while lab results show all blood samples are pig's blood.
scenes.turningPointNote: Discovery that Bob Taylor was a copycat, not the real kidnapper - the children are still missing

scenes.heading: 166 INT. LIVING ROOM - BOB TAYLOR’S HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 166
scenes.summary: Forensics Guy shows Loki the darkened room with mazes drawn on walls and explains that Bob was playacting, using clothes with tags still on and copying from an ex-FBI agent's discredited book about child abductions.

scenes.heading: 167 OMITTED 167
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 168 INT. JOY’S ROOM - THE BIRCHES' HOUSE - DAY 168
scenes.summary: Nancy stares at Joy's dead gerbil in its habitrail when Eliza approaches, then Nancy loses control and smacks Eliza across the face for not feeding it.

scenes.heading: EXT. THE BIRCHES’ HOUSE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eliza bursts out the front door and walks toward the Dovers' house while Nancy yells after her from the doorway before retreating inside and slamming the door.

scenes.heading: 169 INT. RALPH'S ROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 169
scenes.summary: Ralph talks on the phone with Eliza while looking out his window and watching Loki walk through the bushes searching for something.

scenes.heading: 170 EXT. THE DOVERS' HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 170
scenes.summary: Loki examines deep footprints under Anna's window and discovers a sock with a rabbit face in the bushes, then sees Ralph coming out with a duffle bag.

scenes.heading: 171 INT. BATHROOM - SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - DAY 171
scenes.summary: Keller feeds a snake into the PVC pipe toward Jones, causing him to thrash and scream, then pulls it back out and threatens to send it all the way in if Jones doesn't talk.

scenes.heading: 172 INT. A SMALL ROOM - DAY 172
scenes.summary: Joy opens her eyes on the floor with purple-stained lips, sees Anna passed out nearby, and discovers a homemade maze book before struggling to stand as her vision distorts.
scenes.turningPointNote: First glimpse of the children alive and their current situation - they are being held and drugged

scenes.heading: 173 EXT. A BACKYARD - CONTINUOUS 173
scenes.summary: Joy and Anna run from their captor across a backyard in their drugged state, with Joy plowing through hedges into a field as Anna lags behind and disappears with screaming.

scenes.heading: EXT. WOODS - DAY
scenes.summary: Joy wanders through the woods, lost, exhausted, and freezing.

scenes.heading: 174 EXT. BUSY STREET - DAY 174
scenes.summary: Joy walks along a busy road in her drugged state as cars appear like astral comets with roaring engines.

scenes.heading: 175 INT. COMPACT CAR - CONTINUOUS 175
scenes.summary: A woman driving sees Joy running without a coat and stops to help, but Joy bolts across the street into the path of a speeding van that crashes into a tree.
scenes.turningPointNote: Joy's escape and rescue - one child is found alive but injured

scenes.heading: 176 INT. MASTER BEDROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - DAY 176
scenes.summary: Grace emerges from blankets in the dark bedroom and answers the ringing phone, listening in the darkness.

scenes.heading: 177 INT. BATHROOM - THE DOVERS' HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 177
scenes.summary: Grace runs from room to room calling for Keller and Ralph, then splashes cold water on her face in the bathroom, accidentally spilling Xanax pills into the sink.

scenes.heading: 178 EXT. THE DOVERS' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 178
scenes.summary: Grace bursts out in her nightgown and tells Keller they found Joy alive at the hospital, but Anna wasn't with her, causing Keller's world to spin as a news van rushes by.
scenes.turningPointNote: Joy found alive but Anna still missing - hope and despair collide

scenes.heading: 179 INT. HALLWAY - ST. CELESTINE HOSPITAL - DAY 179
scenes.summary: Keller and Grace push through a crowded hospital hallway past a cop who tries to stop them, with Grace screaming at him not to touch her before bolting toward Franklin.

scenes.heading: 180 INT. PRIVATE ROOM - ST. CELESTINE HOSPITAL - CONTINUOUS 180
scenes.summary: Grace and Keller enter Joy's hospital room where Nancy sits by the bedside, and Keller squats down to look Joy in the eyes while she lies there like a dream come to life.

scenes.heading: 181 INT. HALLWAY - ST. CELESTINE HOSPITAL - CONTINUOUS 181
scenes.summary: Loki walks down the hallway angry about unauthorized visitors, sees Keller exit the room and turn away, then watches as Keller heads for the stairwell while Grace calls after him.

scenes.heading: 182 EXT. ST. CELESTINE HOSPITAL - MOMENTS LATER 182
scenes.summary: Keller runs out of the hospital entrance toward his truck as voices erupt behind him and a cop yells for him to stop.

scenes.heading: 183 INT. KELLER’S TRUCK - PARKED/TRAVELING - CONTINUOUS 183
scenes.summary: Keller gets in his truck, starts it up, and drives straight over a grassy median as a shortcut to the main road.

scenes.heading: 184 EXT. ST. CELESTINE HOSPITAL - CONTINUOUS 184
scenes.summary: Loki bursts out of the hospital entrance and runs to his car, seeing Keller's truck screeching down the road as other cops run to their cruisers.

scenes.heading: 185 INT. LOKI’S SEDAN - MOMENTS LATER 185
scenes.summary: Loki backs out fast over the grassy median, spins out into traffic with horns blaring, then stops at an intersection looking for Keller's truck before doing a screaming U-turn.

scenes.heading: 186 EXT. APARTMENT HOUSE - DAY 186
scenes.summary: Ralph drives Grace's car to the apartment house with Eliza, who wants to call her mother back, and they enter through a boarded rear window to avoid being seen.

scenes.heading: 187 INT. THE CELL - CONTINUOUS 187
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 188 INT. FIRST FLOOR APARTMENT - APARTMENT HOUSE - MOMENTS 188
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 189 INT. STAIRS - APARTMENT HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 189
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 190 INT. SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - APARTMENT HOUSE - MOMENTS 190
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 191 INT. FIRST FLOOR APARTMENT - CONTINUOUS 191
scenes.summary: Eliza waits nervously in the first floor apartment when Ralph yells for her to come upstairs.

scenes.heading: 192 INT. BATHROOM - SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - CONTINUOUS 192
scenes.summary: Ralph calls 911 while holding a shaking phone, Eliza enters and sees disturbing pictures, and they hear a thump from inside a cell as Ralph reports finding Anna Dover.
scenes.turningPointNote: Anna Dover is discovered alive in captivity

scenes.heading: 193 EXT. APARTMENT HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 193
scenes.summary: Loki's sedan screeches to a halt outside the apartment house, he hears Eliza screaming inside and runs around to the back window he used earlier.

scenes.heading: 194 INT. STAIRS - THE APARTMENT HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER 194
scenes.summary: Loki runs up the stairs and encounters Ralph and Eliza coming down in shock, unable to speak, so he rushes past them.

scenes.heading: 195 INT. SECOND FLOOR HALLWAY - APARTMENT HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 195
scenes.summary: Loki reaches the top of the stairs with his gun ready, moves down the hallway to the open apartment door, looks inside and his face drops as he lowers his gun.

scenes.heading: 196 EXT. FRONT DOOR - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - NIGHT 196
scenes.summary: Keller rings Holly Jones' doorbell carrying a duffle bag, she opens the door holding an ice pack around her hand, and he asks to do penance for scaring her at the police station.

scenes.heading: 197 INT. VESTIBULE - HOLLY JONES’ HOUSE - NIGHT 197
scenes.summary: Holly Jones shows Keller inside and closes the door, walking to the kitchen while he lingers in the vestibule watching her before she tells him to come make tea.

scenes.heading: 198 INT. KITCHEN - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - NIGHT 198
scenes.summary: Keller fills a tea kettle and turns on the stove, tells Holly he doesn't want to hurt her and knows the children were there, then she reveals a .38 revolver and forces him to put on handcuffs at gunpoint.
scenes.turningPointNote: Holly Jones reveals herself as the true antagonist by pulling a gun on Keller

scenes.heading: 199 EXT. BACK YARD - HOLLY JONES’ HOUSE - NIGHT 199
scenes.summary: Holly Jones forces handcuffed Keller outside at gunpoint, reveals she and her husband took Alex and many other children to wage war with God and make people lose faith, then shoots Keller and pushes him into a hole.
scenes.turningPointNote: Holly Jones reveals the full scope of her crimes and traps Keller in the hole

scenes.heading: 200 INT. THE HOLE - CONTINUOUS 200
scenes.summary: Keller lands hard in the hole with a gunshot wound, Holly tells him he might last twenty-four hours and threatens to dump his daughter's body down there, he sees Anna's red whistle before everything goes black.

scenes.heading: 201 EXT. BACK YARD - HOLLY JONES’ HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 201
scenes.summary: Holly Jones cuts the car engine and gets out as it starts to snow.

scenes.heading: EXT. GUN HILL ROAD - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Holly gets in Keller's truck, starts it up, and drives it into the backyard out of sight.

scenes.heading: INT. PRIVATE ROOM - ST. CELESTINE HOSPITAL - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Joy sleeps in her hospital bed while Nancy and Franklin watch news footage of Jones being loaded into an ambulance, with a reporter stating Jones was held captive for five days.

scenes.heading: 202 INT. DEN - HOLLY JONES’ HOUSE - NIGHT 202
scenes.summary: Holly Jones watches the same news report in her den, learning that the building might be owned by Anna Dover's father, and she exudes rage.

scenes.heading: 203 EXT. HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - NIGHT 203
scenes.summary: The lights in Holly Jones' house windows go out one by one.

scenes.heading: 204 INT. KITCHEN - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 204
scenes.summary: Holly Jones hoists Keller's duffle bag onto the kitchen table and empties its contents including rope, rifle, duct tape, and a white box with skull and crossbones containing a syringe.

scenes.heading: 205 INT. BATHROOM - SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - CONTINUOUS 205
scenes.summary: Loki and the forensics team stare at the empty cell, completely befuddled by what they're seeing.

scenes.heading: 206 INT. SECOND FLOOR APARTMENT - CONTINUOUS 206
scenes.summary: Loki walks out of the bathroom looking deflated and lost, O'Malley tells him not to find Dover but to go notify Holly Jones instead.

scenes.heading: 207 INT. THE HOLE - CONTINUOUS 207
scenes.summary: Keller flicks a lighter in the darkness of the hole, sees the rusted handcuff chain broke in his fall, illuminates children's bicycles and an old sneaker, then tries unsuccessfully to climb out as the dirt crumbles.

scenes.heading: 208 INT. BLACK SEDAN - TRAVELING - NIGHT 208
scenes.summary: Loki pulls up in front of Holly Jones' house in his black sedan and turns off the engine.

scenes.heading: 209 INT. A ROOM - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 209
scenes.summary: Anna lies sleeping on the floor when the sound of a deadbolt lock tumbling wakes her as the door starts to open, but then the doorbell rings.

scenes.heading: 210 EXT. FRONT DOOR - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 210
scenes.summary: Loki rings the doorbell again and waits at Holly Jones' front door.

scenes.heading: 211 EXT. UNDER THE TRANS AM - CONTINUOUS 211
scenes.summary: Keller's fingers push the plywood sheet off center and he climbs out from under the Trans Am, grabbing pipes that break and spray oil in his face before successfully pulling himself up.

scenes.heading: 212 EXT. FRONT DOOR - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 212
scenes.summary: Loki starts to leave but notices a curtain swaying as if someone was peeking out, returns to the front door, hears movement inside and someone crying out.

scenes.heading: 213 OMITTED 213
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 214 OMITTED 214
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 215 OMITTED 215
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 216 INT. VESTIBULE - HOLLY JONES’ HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 216
scenes.summary: Loki opens the front door and moves inside the vestibule, keyed up.

scenes.heading: 217 INT. BACK DOOR - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 217
scenes.summary: The back door opens and Keller creeps inside, his oil-slicked form almost invisible in the gloom.

scenes.heading: 218 INT. LIVING ROOM - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 218
scenes.summary: Loki moves through the living room and notices a framed photo of Holly's husband wearing the familiar maze pendant, realizing he's the corpse found in Dunn's basement, then hears something knocked over in the kitchen.
scenes.turningPointNote: Loki discovers Holly's husband was the corpse with the maze pendant, connecting the crimes

scenes.heading: 219 INT. KITCHEN - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 219
scenes.summary: Loki enters the kitchen and sees Keller's duffle bag on the table with the opened poison box containing skull and crossbones and syringe.

scenes.heading: 220 INT. HALLWAY - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 220
scenes.summary: Keller moves into the hallway holding his breath, opens a door to see a room stuffed with junk, then moves to the next door with the deadbolt and turns the lock.

scenes.heading: 221 INT. A ROOM - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 221
scenes.summary: Keller opens the door to see Anna huddled in the corner and walks towards her with tears in his eyes and quickening breath.
scenes.turningPointNote: Keller finds Anna alive

scenes.heading: 222 INT. HALLWAY - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 222
scenes.summary: Loki approaches the same room and stops, seeing shadows on the wall of a figure looming over Anna's shadow, then takes a breath with gun ready.

scenes.heading: 223 INT. A ROOM - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 223
scenes.summary: Keller rushes toward the door with Anna in his arms when it slams in his face and they're thrown into darkness.

scenes.heading: 224 INT. THE HOLE - CONTINUOUS 224
scenes.summary: Keller clicks his mini-maglight in blackness, his face sea-sick and blinking, seeing the dirt walls and rusted bikes distorting as he realizes his escape was a hallucination and he's still in the hole.

scenes.heading: 225 EXT. BACK YARD - HOLLY JONES’ HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 225
scenes.summary: The Trans Am sits in the backyard while Keller's screaming can be heard faintly from beneath it.

scenes.heading: 226 INT. A ROOM - HOLLY JONES' HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 226
scenes.summary: Loki enters the room with gun outstretched to find Holly Jones injecting poison into Anna's arm, she drops the half-emptied syringe and pulls out a .38 revolver, both fire their weapons simultaneously.
scenes.turningPointNote: Final confrontation between Loki and Holly Jones as she poisons Anna

scenes.heading: 227 EXT. HOLLY JONES’ HOUSE - CONTINUOUS 227
scenes.summary: Loki bursts out the front door with Anna in his arms, blood running down his face, gets her in his car and guns the engine.

scenes.heading: 228 INT. BLACK SEDAN - TRAVELING - CONTINUOUS 228
scenes.summary: Loki drives sixty miles per hour through falling snow with blood in his eyes, engine roaring down a country road.

scenes.heading: EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Loki's sedan speeds through the blur of falling white snow on the country road.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK SEDAN - TRAVELING - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Anna starts convulsing in the back seat as Loki approaches a red light intersection, telling her to stay with him.

scenes.heading: EXT. COUNTRY ROAD/INTERSECTION - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Loki leans on his horn and blasts through the red light, a car just misses him and careens off the road, then he turns onto a highway on-ramp with traffic ahead.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK SEDAN - TRAVELING - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Loki veers onto the highway shoulder, squeezing past slow moving cars and bouncing over craggy ground.

scenes.heading: EXT. HIGHWAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Loki swerves onto an exit ramp, skidding through the turn.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK SEDAN - TRAVELING - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Loki sees Anna's convulsing getting worse in the rearview mirror.

scenes.heading: EXT. MAIN ROAD - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Loki tears down a straightaway past scrolling strip mall lights in falling snow.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK SEDAN - TRAVELING - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Loki peers back at Anna telling her to stay with him, sees stopped traffic ahead and cuts through a strip mall parking lot as lights and snow become disorienting.

scenes.heading: EXT. STRIP MALL - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Loki's sedan blasts out of the strip mall parking lot and makes a hard, skidding turn.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK SEDAN - TRAVELING - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Loki drives on a straightaway as the illuminated hospital sign comes into view.

scenes.heading: 229 EXT. ST. CELESTINE HOSPITAL - EMERGENCY ENTRANCE - 229
scenes.summary: Loki crashes his car at the hospital emergency entrance and carries Anna inside while blood gushes down his face, screaming for help.

scenes.heading: 230 INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - ST. CELESTINE HOSPITAL - DAY 230
scenes.summary: Loki lies in a hospital bed reading about Alex Jones being reunited with his family after 27 years and Keller still missing, then Grace arrives pushing Anna in a wheelchair.

scenes.heading: 231 INT. HALLWAY - ST. CELESTINE HOSPITAL 231
scenes.summary: Nancy walks out with the girls while Franklin struggles with her silent plea before breaking her gaze and walking to a uniform cop at the end of the hall.

scenes.heading: 232 INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - ST. CELESTINE HOSPITAL - CONTINUOUS 232
scenes.summary: Grace tells Loki that Anna found her whistle and that Keller hasn't contacted her, expressing that she misses him and believes he's a good man who did what he had to do.

scenes.heading: 233 EXT. BACK YARD - HOLLY JONES’ HOUSE - NIGHT 233
scenes.summary: Loki returns to Holly Jones' backyard crime scene at night where forensic techs are excavating, finding only a frozen snake so far in the frozen ground.

scenes.heading: 234 EXT. BACK YARD - HOLLY JONES’ HOUSE - NIGHT 234
scenes.summary: Loki discovers a hollow sound under the Trans Am's plywood base, pushes the car away with forensic techs, and finds Keller slumped half-frozen at the bottom of a pit with the red whistle in his lap.
scenes.turningPointNote: The discovery of Keller alive resolves the protagonist's fate and completes the search that has driven the entire story.

structuralWarnings.text: 2 of 3 key moments were auto-corrected by Phase 1C
